igbo.sr_imported: Ebubatara organizer — ugbu a mee ka ọ bụrụ nke gị
igbo.sr_reset: Atọgharịrị nhazi ka ọ laghachi na ụdị mbụ
igbo.sculpt_failed: Ịkpụ ihe dara — nwaa nkọwa dị mfe.
igbo.assess_failed: Coach enweghị ike ịza — nwaa ọzọ.
igbo.sr_assessed: Nkọwa coach dịla njikere n'okpuru builder panel
igbo.recall_needs_more: Buru ụzọ tinye opekata mpe ideas 4 n'ime otu 2
igbo.sr_recall_started: Recall mode: ideas niile dabara na tray. Weghachi nke ọ bụla n'ọnọdụ ya.
igbo.sr_recall_complete: Ị rụzigharịrị ụwa gị dum site na ncheta!
igbo.snapshot_failed: Enweghị ike ijide 3D view ebe a.
igbo.print_saved: Ebudatara one-pager — meghee ya bipụta ya
igbo.import_replaces: Nke a ga-anọchi composition gị ugbu a.
igbo.title: Forms Nweere Onwe
igbo.tagline: Wuo Ụwa Forms nke gị: họrọ archetypal structure, jupụta ya na ideas gị, hazie na 3D, ma pịa ihe dị mkpa.
igbo.tagline2: Ebe a ị bụ onye edemede — AI naanị na-enye ndụmọdụ, ọ bụkwa naanị mgbe ị rịọrọ.
igbo.keep_content_hint: Otu na ideas gị nọ — ịhọrọ form naanị na-agbanwe ụdị oghere.
igbo.print_tip: Budata one-pager e nwere ike ibipụta (snapshot + ideas gị + nkọwa coach)
igbo.recall_tip: Ideas gị na-adaba na tray — weghachi ha site na ncheta
igbo.assess_needs_items: Buru ụzọ tinye opekata mpe ideas 3
igbo.assess_tip: Rịọ AI coach ka o lee composition gị dum
igbo.recall_instructions: Ideas niile dara site n'ọnọdụ ha gaa na tray dị n'okpuru. Họrọ idea n'oghere, wee jiri group chips (ma ọ bụ igodo [ na ]) izilaghachi ya. Ọ dịghị ihe a na-echekwa n'oge egwuregwu.
igbo.note_placeholder: Gịnị mere idea a ji nọrọ ebe a?
igbo.no_3d: Enweghị ike ibu 3D space ebe a — builder panel gị ka na-arụ ọrụ, ihe niile ị na-ede ka a na-echekwa.
igbo.stage_hint: N'oghere: dọrọ idea idobe ya · dọrọ background ịgba gburugburu · scroll ịwụba · [ na ] na-ebugharị idea ahọrọ n'etiti otu.
